Stephania crassicaulis is a plant species in the family Menispermaceae. The plant is believed to have potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antifungal properties, which may help in treating various health conditions. The bioactive constituents of Stephania crassicaulis include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare various herbal formulations, including teas, tinctures, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
